Kadir Has University

Political Science and International Relations

The Department of Political Science and International Relations at Kadir Has University offers students an in-depth understanding of global and local political dynamics. In addition, the department offers a comprehensive curriculum in areas such as political theory, theories of international relations, comparative politics and international security. Students can deepen their interests through elective courses and gain career opportunities in various institutions in Turkey and abroad. In addition to providing intellectual depth, the department aims to develop critical thinking and international communication skills.
